msg.invalidTypeString: Expected a value of type string.
msg.invalidTypeNumber: Expected a value of type number.
msg.invalidTypeBoolean: Expected a value of type boolean.
msg.invalidTypeArray: Expected a value of type array.
msg.invalidTypeObject: Expected a value of type object.
msg.invalidEnumValue: The provided value is not one of the allowed options.
msg.invalidUnionType: The value does not match any of the allowed types.
msg.invalidEntityId: The entity ID is invalid or malformed.
msg.invalidDecimal: The value must be a valid decimal number.
msg.invalidActionObject: The action object is invalid or improperly structured.
msg.missingActionKey: A required key is missing in the action object.
msg.invalidCustomThemeArray: The custom theme must be an array.
msg.invalidCustomThemeEntry: One or more entries in the custom theme are invalid.
msg.invalidMinValue: The minimum value is invalid or below allowed limits.
msg.invalidMaxValue: The maximum value is invalid or above allowed limits.
msg.minGreaterThanMax: Minimum value cannot be greater than maximum value.
msg.missingColorProperty: A required color property is missing.
msg.invalidIconType: The specified icon type is invalid or unrecognized.
msg.invalidStateContent: The state content is invalid or malformed.
msg.invalidStateContentEntry: One or more entries in the state content are invalid.
msg.invalidTheme: The specified theme is unknown. Default theme will be used.
msg.appliedDefaultValue: A default value has been applied automatically.
